name_policy: Personal names remain in original English.
spoiler_policy: Only information available through each current paragraph is used.

blocks.original_text: The walls of the throne room had been stripped bare, the hunting tapestries that King Robert loved taken down and stacked in the corner in an untidy heap.
blocks.explanation_zh: throne room撤下Robert喜爱的hunting tapestries，bare walls宣告旧统治视觉痕迹被清除。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 移除tapestries不是普通整理，而是清除Robert leisure/warrior imagery；堆在corner显示旧王taste已降为杂物。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: Ser Mandon Moore went to take his place under the throne beside two of his fellows of the Kingsguard. Sansa hovered by the door, for once unguarded. The queen had given her freedom of the castle as a reward for being good, yet even so, she was escorted everywhere she went. “Honor guards for my daughter-to-be,” the queen called them, but they did not make Sansa feel honored.
blocks.explanation_zh: Mandon归Kingsguard位置；Sansa名义获自由却始终有escort，honor guards并不让她感到honored。
blocks.literary_note_zh: reward freedom与constant escort并存，语言把surveillance重新命名为honor。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “Freedom of the castle” meant that she could go wherever she chose within the Red Keep so long as she promised not to go beyond the walls, a promise Sansa had been more than willing to give. She couldn’t have gone beyond the walls anyway. The gates were watched day and night by Janos Slynt’s gold cloaks, and Lannister house guards were always about as well. Besides, even if she could leave the castle, where would she go? It was enough that she could walk in the yard, pick flowers in Myrcella’s garden, and visit the sept to pray for her father. Sometimes she prayed in the godswood as well, since the Starks kept the old gods.
blocks.explanation_zh: freedom只限Red Keep且不能出walls；gates受guard，她也无处可去，只能散步、采花、向Seven和old gods祈祷。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她愿promise不出墙不等于真正choice：gates、guards、无目的地已先关闭其他行动。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: This was the first court session of Joffrey’s reign, so Sansa looked about nervously. A line of Lannister house guards stood beneath the western windows, a line of gold-cloaked City Watchmen beneath the east. Of smallfolk and commoners, she saw no sign, but under the gallery a cluster of lords great and small milled restlessly. There were no more than twenty, where a hundred had been accustomed to wait upon King Robert.
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey首场court由Lannister guards与gold cloaks夹厅，没有smallfolk，lords仅约二十而Robert时常有百人。
blocks.literary_note_zh: attendance骤减与无smallfolk说明首场court不是常态public justice，而是政治筛选后的audience。
blocks.background_zh: **first court：** monarch公开听petitions、发布decrees并展示council；本场无smallfolk且attendance稀少。

blocks.original_text: Sansa slipped in among them, murmuring greetings as she worked her way toward the front. She recognized black-skinned Jalabhar Xho, gloomy Ser Aron Santagar, the Redwyne twins Horror and Slobber . . . only none of them seemed to recognize her. Or if they did, they shied away as if she had the grey plague. Sickly Lord Gyles covered his face at her approach and feigned a fit of coughing, and when funny drunken Ser Dontos started to hail her, Ser Balon Swann whispered in his ear and he turned away.
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa穿过lords礼貌问候，却被熟人回避，Dontos也被Swann提醒后转身。
blocks.literary_note_zh: grey plague比喻显示接近Sansa会传染政治风险；courtiers用回避保护自己。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: And so many others were missing. Where had the rest of them gone? Sansa wondered. Vainly, she searched for friendly faces. Not one of them would meet her eyes. It was as if she had become a ghost, dead before her time.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她寻找friendly faces失败，觉得自己像未死先成ghost。
blocks.literary_note_zh: ghost意象指社会性死亡：名字仍在court，关系网络却不承认她。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: Grand Maester Pycelle was seated alone at the council table, seemingly asleep, his hands clasped together atop his beard. She saw Lord Varys hurry into the hall, his feet making no sound. A moment later Lord Baelish entered through the tall doors in the rear, smiling. He chatted amiably with Ser Balon and Ser Dontos as he made his way to the front. Butterflies fluttered nervously in Sansa’s stomach. I shouldn’t be afraid, she told herself. I have nothing to be afraid of, it will all come out well, Joff loves me and the queen does too, she said so.
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle、Varys、Littlefinger入场；Sansa以Cersei和Joffrey爱她来自我安慰，却身体紧张。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert symbols被撤、court attendance锐减；Sansa在名义freedom与实际监视下进入Joffrey首场court，听到全国fealty名单。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: A herald’s voice rang out. “All hail His Grace, Joffrey of the Houses Baratheon and Lannister, the First of his Name, King of the Andals, the Rhoynar, and the First Men, and Lord of the Seven Kingdoms. All hail his lady mother, Cersei of House Lannister, Queen Regent, Light of the West, and Protector of the Realm.”
blocks.explanation_zh: herald宣告Joffrey完整王号与Cersei Regent、Protector titles。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei同时获Regent、Protector，吸收Robert will原赋Eddard的executive authority。
blocks.background_zh: **Queen Regent：** Joffrey未成年，Cersei以mother身份摄政；Protector title进一步集中军事/行政权。

blocks.original_text: Ser Barristan Selmy, resplendent in white plate, led them in. Ser Arys Oakheart escorted the queen, while Ser Boros Blount walked beside Joffrey, so six of the Kingsguard were now in the hall, all the White Swords save Jaime Lannister alone. Her prince—no, her king now!—took the steps of the Iron Throne two at a time, while his mother was seated with the council. Joff wore plush black velvets slashed with crimson, a shimmering cloth-of-gold cape with a high collar, and on his head a golden crown crusted with rubies and black diamonds.
blocks.explanation_zh: Barristan引领王室，六名Kingsguard到齐；Joffrey着black/crimson/gold与gem crown登Iron Throne。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert symbols被撤、court attendance锐减；Sansa在名义freedom与实际监视下进入Joffrey首场court，听到全国fealty名单。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: When Joffrey turned to look out over the hall, his eye caught Sansa’s. He smiled, seated himself, and spoke. “It is a king’s duty to punish the disloyal and reward those who are true. Grand Maester Pycelle, I command you to read my decrees.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey对Sansa微笑，宣布king duty是罚不忠、赏忠诚，命Pycelle读decrees。
blocks.literary_note_zh: punish/reward建立本场decrees统一逻辑：忠诚不是抽象美德，而是titles、lands与生死分配标准。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: Pycelle pushed himself to his feet. He was clad in a magnificent robe of thick red velvet, with an ermine collar and shiny gold fastenings. From a drooping sleeve, heavy with gilded scrollwork, he drew a parchment, unrolled it, and began to read a long list of names, commanding each in the name of king and council to present themselves and swear their fealty to Joffrey. Failing that, they would be adjudged traitors, their lands and titles forfeit to the throne.
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle宣读需来宣誓fealty的名单，否则判traitor并没收lands、titles。
blocks.literary_note_zh: present and swear把不来court本身变成treason，要求分散lords主动进入Joffrey控制空间。
blocks.background_zh: **forfeiture：** 被判traitor可失lands、titles，throne再分封给loyal supporters。

blocks.original_text: The names he read made Sansa hold her breath. Lord Stannis Baratheon, his lady wife, his daughter. Lord Renly Baratheon. Both Lord Royces and their sons. Ser Loras Tyrell. Lord Mace Tyrell, his brothers, uncles, sons. The red priest, Thoros of Myr. Lord Beric Dondarrion. Lady Lysa Arryn and her son, the little Lord Robert. Lord Hoster Tully, his brother Ser Brynden, his son Ser Edmure. Lord Jason Mallister. Lord Bryce Caron of the Marches. Lord Tytos Blackwood. Lord Walder Frey and his heir Ser Stevron. Lord Karyl Vance. Lord Jonos Bracken. Lady Sheila Whent. Doran Martell, Prince of Dorne, and all his sons. So many, she thought as Pycelle read on and on, it will take a whole flock of ravens to send out these commands.
blocks.explanation_zh: 名单横跨Baratheons、Tyrells、Vale、Riverlands、Dorne等许多lords，Sansa惊叹需一群ravens。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 名单过广可能是建立legal claim：未来可将未服从者逐一forfeit，而非预期所有人真来。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: And at the end, near last, came the names Sansa had been dreading. Lady Catelyn Stark. Robb Stark. Brandon Stark, Rickon Stark, Arya Stark. Sansa stifled a gasp. Arya. They wanted Arya to present herself and swear an oath . . . it must mean her sister had fled on the galley, she must be safe at Winterfell by now . . .
blocks.explanation_zh: 末尾出现Catelyn、Robb、Bran、Rickon、Arya；Sansa因Arya被召而误以为她已乘ship安全回Winterfell。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya列名只能证明regime要求她服从，不能证明知道她在Winterfell；Sansa把bureaucratic list误读为安全消息。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: Grand Maester Pycelle rolled up the list, tucked it up his left sleeve, and pulled another parchment from his right. He cleared his throat and resumed. “In the place of the traitor Eddard Stark, it is the wish of His Grace that Tywin Lannister, Lord of Casterly Rock and Warden of the West, take up the office of Hand of the King, to speak with his voice, lead his armies against his enemies, and carry out his royal will. So the king has decreed. The small council consents.
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle宣告Tywin取代traitor Eddard任Hand，small council consents。
blocks.literary_note_zh: small council consents反复作为公式，将已由Cersei/Joffrey决定的任命包装成collective governance。
blocks.background_zh: **new Hand：** Eddard被囚后Tywin获任Hand，可代表king发令并领royal armies。

blocks.original_text: “In the place of the traitor Stannis Baratheon, it is the wish of His Grace that his lady mother, the Queen Regent Cersei Lannister, who has ever been his staunchest support, be seated upon his small council, that she may help him rule wisely and with justice. So the king has decreed. The small council consents.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei取代traitor Stannis进入small council辅助Joffrey统治。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 新政权任Tywin Hand、Cersei council/Protector、Janos lord of Harrenhal，以office与land奖励忠诚。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: Sansa heard a soft murmuring from the lords around her, but it was quickly stilled. Pycelle continued.
blocks.explanation_zh: lords低声议论但迅速安静。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 新政权任Tywin Hand、Cersei council/Protector、Janos lord of Harrenhal，以office与land奖励忠诚。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “It is also the wish of His Grace that his loyal servant, Janos Slynt, Commander of the City Watch of King’s Landing, be at once raised to the rank of lord and granted the ancient seat of Harrenhal with all its attendant lands and incomes, and that his sons and grandsons shall hold these honors after him until the end of time. It is moreover his command that Lord Slynt be seated immediately upon his small council, to assist in the governance of the realm. So the king has decreed. The small council consents.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Janos因loyal service被封Harrenhal lord、世袭土地收入并入small council。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Janos reward把throne-room betrayal兑换成hereditary lordship与council seat，bloody spear几乎公开呈现暴力来源。
blocks.background_zh: **Harrenhal grant：** 巨大古castle及lands象征跃升，但实际控制仍受riverlands war影响。

blocks.original_text: Sansa glimpsed motion from the corner of her eye as Janos Slynt made his entrance. This time the muttering was louder and angrier. Proud lords whose houses went back thousands of years made way reluctantly for the balding, frog-faced commoner as he marched past. Golden scales had been sewn onto the black velvet of his doublet and rang together softly with each step. His cloak was checked black-and-gold satin. Two ugly boys who must have been his sons went before him, struggling with the weight of a heavy metal shield as tall as they were. For his sigil he had taken a bloody spear, gold on a night-black field. The sight of it raised goose prickles up and down Sansa’s arms.
blocks.explanation_zh: Janos携sons、bloody spear sigil进场；ancient lords不满给commoner让路，Sansa看到sigil起goose bumps。
blocks.literary_note_zh: ancient lords愤怒针对common birth与新贵，不必等于反对其屠杀Stark men。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: As Lord Slynt took his place, Grand Maester Pycelle resumed. “Lastly, in these times of treason and turmoil, with our beloved Robert so lately dead, it is the view of the council that the life and safety of King Joffrey is of paramount importance . . . ” He looked to the queen.
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle以Joffrey safety极重要引出最后决定并看向Cersei。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 新政权任Tywin Hand、Cersei council/Protector、Janos lord of Harrenhal，以office与land奖励忠诚。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: Cersei stood. “Ser Barristan Selmy, stand forth.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei命Barristan上前。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei强行解除Barristan lifelong Kingsguard vow并任Jaime；Barristan拒补偿、掷剑、预言Stannis夺位后离场。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: Ser Barristan had been standing at the foot of the Iron Throne, as still as any statue, but now he went to one knee and bowed his head. “Your Grace, I am yours to command.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Barristan跪地表示听命。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei强行解除Barristan lifelong Kingsguard vow并任Jaime；Barristan拒补偿、掷剑、预言Stannis夺位后离场。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “Rise, Ser Barristan,” Cersei Lannister said. “You may remove your helm.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei叫他起身脱helm。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei强行解除Barristan lifelong Kingsguard vow并任Jaime；Barristan拒补偿、掷剑、预言Stannis夺位后离场。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “My lady?” Standing, the old knight took off his high white helm, though he did not seem to understand why.
blocks.explanation_zh: Barristan虽困惑仍照做。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei强行解除Barristan lifelong Kingsguard vow并任Jaime；Barristan拒补偿、掷剑、预言Stannis夺位后离场。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “You have served the realm long and faithfully, good ser, and every man and woman in the Seven Kingdoms owes you thanks. Yet now I fear your service is at an end. It is the wish of king and council that you lay down your heavy burden.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei先称赞长期服务，再说king/council决定让他卸下burden。
blocks.literary_note_zh: heavy burden是礼貌euphemism，先称service再剥夺身份，延迟Barristan理解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “My . . . burden? I fear I . . . I do not . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: Barristan无法理解burden所指。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei强行解除Barristan lifelong Kingsguard vow并任Jaime；Barristan拒补偿、掷剑、预言Stannis夺位后离场。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: The new-made lord, Janos Slynt, spoke up, his voice heavy and blunt. “Her Grace is trying to tell you that you are relieved as Lord Commander of the Kingsguard.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Janos直说他被解除Kingsguard Lord Commander。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei强行解除Barristan lifelong Kingsguard vow并任Jaime；Barristan拒补偿、掷剑、预言Stannis夺位后离场。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: The tall, white-haired knight seemed to shrink as he stood there, scarcely breathing. “Your Grace,” he said at last. “The Kingsguard is a Sworn Brotherhood. Our vows are taken for life. Only death may relieve the Lord Commander of his sacred trust.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Barristan像缩小般震惊，指出Sworn Brotherhood vows终身，只有death解除sacred trust。
blocks.literary_note_zh: life vows与单方dismissal造成institutional contradiction：若king可解除，sacred permanence变成royal convenience。
blocks.background_zh: **Kingsguard vows：** 传统终身、无lands/wife/children，以七名knights守king；Cersei单方dismissal破例。

blocks.original_text: “Whose death, Ser Barristan?” The queen’s voice was soft as silk, but her words carried the whole length of the hall. “Yours, or your king’s?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei柔声反问需要死的是他还是他的king，把Robert死亡归责暗含其中。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei问题把failure to save Robert等同应以Barristan death负责，回避Robert命令guards退开的事实。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “You let my father die,” Joffrey said accusingly from atop the Iron Throne. “You’re too old to protect anybody.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey指控Barristan让Robert死且年老无用。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei强行解除Barristan lifelong Kingsguard vow并任Jaime；Barristan拒补偿、掷剑、预言Stannis夺位后离场。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: Sansa watched as the knight peered up at his new king. She had never seen him look his years before, yet now he did. “Your Grace,” he said. “I was chosen for the White Swords in my twenty-third year. It was all I had ever dreamed, from the moment I first took sword in hand. I gave up all claim to my ancestral keep. The girl I was to wed married my cousin in my place, I had no need of land or sons, my life would be lived for the realm. Ser Gerold Hightower himself heard my vows . . . to ward the king with all my strength . . . to give my blood for his . . . I fought beside the White Bull and Prince Lewyn of Dorne . . . beside Ser Arthur Dayne, the Sword of the Morning. Before I served your father, I helped shield King Aerys, and his father Jaehaerys before him . . . three kings . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: Barristan回顾二十三岁入White Swords、放弃keep、marriage、sons并服务Jaehaerys、Aerys、Robert三王。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 三王回忆不是自夸年资，而是说明他为vow放弃整个人生后institution突然否认contract。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “And all of them dead,” Littlefinger pointed out.
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger指出三王全死。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger用outcome反驳duty：kings died，所以service被定义失败；忽略guard无法保证immortality。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “Your time is done,” Cersei Lannister announced. “Joffrey requires men around him who are young and strong. The council has determined that Ser Jaime Lannister will take your place as the Lord Commander of Sworn Brothers of the White Swords.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei终止其时代，任Jaime取代Lord Commander。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jaime appointment让dismissal不只是年龄更新，而是把曾杀king者置于lifelong protectors之首。
blocks.background_zh: **Jaime paradox：** 现任Kingsguard却曾杀Aerys，因此被称Kingslayer；如今获升Lord Commander。

blocks.original_text: “The Kingslayer,” Ser Barristan said, his voice hard with contempt. “The false knight who profaned his blade with the blood of the king he had sworn to defend.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Barristan蔑称Jaime Kingslayer、以宣誓保护之王血玷污blade的false knight。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei强行解除Barristan lifelong Kingsguard vow并任Jaime；Barristan拒补偿、掷剑、预言Stannis夺位后离场。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “Have a care for your words, ser,” the queen warned. “You are speaking of our beloved brother, your king’s own blood.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei警告他在侮辱自己brother与Joffrey blood kin。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei强行解除Barristan lifelong Kingsguard vow并任Jaime；Barristan拒补偿、掷剑、预言Stannis夺位后离场。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: Lord Varys spoke, gentler than the others. “We are not unmindful of your service, good ser. Lord Tywin Lannister has generously agreed to grant you a handsome tract of land north of Lannisport, beside the sea, with gold and men sufficient to build you a stout keep, and servants to see to your every need.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys用温和声提出Tywin赠海边land、gold、men、keep与servants作退休补偿。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei强行解除Barristan lifelong Kingsguard vow并任Jaime；Barristan拒补偿、掷剑、预言Stannis夺位后离场。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: Ser Barristan looked up sharply. “A hall to die in, and men to bury me. I thank you, my lords . . . but I spit upon your pity.” He reached up and undid the clasps that held his cloak in place, and the heavy white garment slithered from his shoulders to fall in a heap on the floor. His helmet dropped with a clang. “I am a knight,” he told them. He opened the silver fastenings of his breastplate and let that fall as well. “I shall die a knight.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Barristan拒绝pity，脱下cloak、helm、breastplate，宣告即使被逐也以knight身份死。
blocks.literary_note_zh: cloak/armor落地是主动解除institution symbols；I shall die a knight把identity从office夺回个人。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “A naked knight, it would seem,” quipped Littlefinger.
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger嘲笑成naked knight。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei强行解除Barristan lifelong Kingsguard vow并任Jaime；Barristan拒补偿、掷剑、预言Stannis夺位后离场。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: They all laughed then, Joffrey on his throne, and the lords standing attendance, Janos Slynt and Queen Cersei and Sandor Clegane and even the other men of the Kingsguard, the five who had been his brothers until a moment ago. Surely that must have hurt the most, Sansa thought. Her heart went out to the gallant old man as he stood shamed and red-faced, too angry to speak. Finally he drew his sword.
blocks.explanation_zh: 全场包括旧brothers都笑；Sansa同情Barristan被羞辱，直到他拔剑。
blocks.literary_note_zh: collective laughter把制度处决变成娱乐，old brothers参与使brotherhood背叛最痛。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: Sansa heard someone gasp. Ser Boros and Ser Meryn moved forward to confront him, but Ser Barristan froze them in place with a look that dripped contempt. “Have no fear, sers, your king is safe . . . no thanks to you. Even now, I could cut through the five of you as easy as a dagger cuts cheese. If you would serve under the Kingslayer, not a one of you is fit to wear the white.” He flung his sword at the foot of the Iron Throne. “Here, boy. Melt it down and add it to the others, if you like. It will do you more good than the swords in the hands of these five. Perhaps Lord Stannis will chance to sit on it when he takes your throne.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Boros、Meryn上前却被目光止住；Barristan说可轻易杀五人，掷剑给Joffrey并预言Stannis会夺throne。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Barristan没有attack，反将sword变成Iron Throne material；Stannis remark把legal succession dispute带回hall。
blocks.background_zh: **Stannis claim：** Eddard认定Robert无trueborn children后Stannis为heir；Barristan公开提及使争议未被court抹去。

blocks.original_text: He took the long way out, his steps ringing loud against the floor and echoing off the bare stone walls. Lords and ladies parted to let him pass. Not until the pages had closed the great oak-and-bronze doors behind him did Sansa hear sounds again: soft voices, uneasy stirrings, the shuffle of papers from the council table. “He called me boy,” Joffrey said peevishly, sounding younger than his years. “He talked about my uncle Stannis too.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Barristan长路离场，bare walls放大脚步；沉默后Joffrey只介意被叫boy及Stannis。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Joffrey抓住boy而非vow、service或Stannis claim，显示personal slight支配其注意。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “Idle talk,” said Varys the eunuch. “Without meaning . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys称只是无意义idle talk。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Joffrey命抓Barristan，Janos执行；Sandor获任Kingsguard却拒knight vows，court传统被进一步重写。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “He could be making plots with my uncles. I want him seized and questioned.” No one moved. Joffrey raised his voice. “I said, I want him seized!”
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey怀疑Barristan与uncles plot，连喊两次命人抓他，但起初无人动。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 第二次提高音量才有人应答，暴露king command仍需执行者自愿接上。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: Janos Slynt rose from the council table. “My gold cloaks will see to it, Your Grace.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 新封lord Janos承诺gold cloaks执行。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Joffrey命抓Barristan，Janos执行；Sandor获任Kingsguard却拒knight vows，court传统被进一步重写。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “Good,” said King Joffrey. Lord Janos strode from the hall, his ugly sons double-stepping to keep up as they lugged the great metal shield with the arms of House Slynt.
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey满意，Janos与sons匆忙离厅。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Joffrey命抓Barristan，Janos执行；Sandor获任Kingsguard却拒knight vows，court传统被进一步重写。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “Your Grace,” Littlefinger reminded the king. “If we might resume, the seven are now six. We find ourselves in need of a new sword for your Kingsguard.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger提醒Kingsguard七席现只六，需new sword。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Joffrey命抓Barristan，Janos执行；Sandor获任Kingsguard却拒knight vows，court传统被进一步重写。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: Joffrey smiled. “Tell them, Mother.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey笑着让mother宣布。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Joffrey命抓Barristan，Janos执行；Sandor获任Kingsguard却拒knight vows，court传统被进一步重写。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “The king and council have determined that no man in the Seven Kingdoms is more fit to guard and protect His Grace than his sworn shield, Sandor Clegane.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei任命Joffrey sworn shield Sandor为最适合的Kingsguard。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sandor competence取代knighthood qualification，Cersei公开改写Kingsguard传统。
blocks.background_zh: **Sandor exception：** 他武力强且为Joffrey sworn shield，却从未受knighthood并拒绝knight vows。

blocks.original_text: “How do you like that, dog?” King Joffrey asked.
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey以dog称呼Sandor并问感受。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Joffrey命抓Barristan，Janos执行；Sandor获任Kingsguard却拒knight vows，court传统被进一步重写。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: The Hound’s scarred face was hard to read. He took a long moment to consider. “Why not? I have no lands nor wife to forsake, and who’d care if I did?” The burned side of his mouth twisted. “But I warn you, I’ll say no knight’s vows.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Sandor思考后接受，称无lands、wife可放弃，但拒绝说knight vows。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sandor拒vows却接受office，延续他对knight hypocrisy的鄙视，也使Sworn Brotherhood名称产生空洞。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “The Sworn Brothers of the Kingsguard have always been knights,” Ser Boros said firmly.
blocks.explanation_zh: Boros坚持Kingsguard历来都是knights。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Joffrey命抓Barristan，Janos执行；Sandor获任Kingsguard却拒knight vows，court传统被进一步重写。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “Until now,” the Hound said in his deep rasp, and Ser Boros fell silent.
blocks.explanation_zh: Sandor说直到现在，Boros沉默。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Joffrey命抓Barristan，Janos执行；Sandor获任Kingsguard却拒knight vows，court传统被进一步重写。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: When the king’s herald moved forward, Sansa realized the moment was almost at hand. She smoothed down the cloth of her skirt nervously. She was dressed in mourning, as a sign of respect for the dead king, but she had taken special care to make herself beautiful. Her gown was the ivory silk that the queen had given her, the one Arya had ruined, but she’d had them dye it black and you couldn’t see the stain at all. She had fretted over her jewelry for hours and finally decided upon the elegant simplicity of a plain silver chain.
blocks.explanation_zh: herald将开放petitions，Sansa整理mourning dress；她把被Arya弄脏的ivory gown染black，并精心选plain silver chain。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 染黑旧gown既适应mourning，又遮去Arya stain；Sansa把被损坏的身份物件重新用于court performance。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: The herald’s voice boomed out. “If any man in this hall has other matters to set before His Grace, let him speak now or go forth and hold his silence.”
blocks.explanation_zh: herald宣布有事者现在提出，否则离开保持沉默。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Joffrey命抓Barristan，Janos执行；Sandor获任Kingsguard却拒knight vows，court传统被进一步重写。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: Sansa quailed. Now, she told herself, I must do it now. Gods give me courage. She took one step, then another. Lords and knights stepped aside silently to let her pass, and she felt the weight of their eyes on her. I must be as strong as my lady mother. “Your Grace,” she called out in a soft, tremulous voice.
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa畏缩后祈祷勇气，一步步走出，提醒自己像Catelyn般strong。
blocks.literary_note_zh: quailed与继续走并存，勇气不是不怕；她真正冒着public rejection为Eddard求命。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: The height of the Iron Throne gave Joffrey a better vantage point than anyone else in the hall. He was the first to see her. “Come forward, my lady,” he called out, smiling.
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey最先从高throne看见，笑叫她上前。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa克服恐惧公开求Eddard mercy，在不否认treason前提下提供被欺骗/药物解释，最终得到以confession为条件的承诺。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: His smile emboldened her, made her feel beautiful and strong. He does love me, he does. Sansa lifted her head and walked toward him, not too slow and not too fast. She must not let them see how nervous she was.
blocks.explanation_zh: smile给她勇气与被爱感，她控制步速、隐藏紧张。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Joffrey smile是她的主要evidence，但也可能只是courtly pleasure；她立即解释为love。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “The Lady Sansa, of House Stark,” the herald cried.
blocks.explanation_zh: herald正式报Lady Sansa of House Stark。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa克服恐惧公开求Eddard mercy，在不否认treason前提下提供被欺骗/药物解释，最终得到以confession为条件的承诺。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: She stopped under the throne, at the spot where Ser Barristan’s white cloak lay puddled on the floor beside his helm and breastplate. “Do you have some business for king and council, Sansa?” the queen asked from the council table.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她停在Barristan丢弃cloak、armor处，Cersei问有何business。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 跪在Barristan cloak上保护dress形成残酷并置：她用刚被羞辱者vow symbol垫膝求同一regime mercy。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “I do.” She knelt on the cloak, so as not to spoil her gown, and looked up at her prince on his fearsome black throne. “As it please Your Grace, I ask mercy for my father, Lord Eddard Stark, who was the Hand of the King.” She had practiced the words a hundred times.
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa跪在white cloak上保护dress，按百次练习的话请求赦免Eddard。
blocks.literary_note_zh: practiced hundred times表明petition并非临时冲动，而是受控环境中精心准备的政治行动。
blocks.background_zh: **petition strategy：** Sansa不能挑战Joffrey kingship，只能承认punishment必要、把Eddard行为归因受骗/药物并请求mercy。

blocks.original_text: The queen sighed. “Sansa, you disappoint me. What did I tell you about traitor’s blood?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei叹息说她令人失望，提醒traitor’s blood。
blocks.literary_note_zh: traitor’s blood立刻测试她是否会从Eddard切割；Cersei把family loyalty设为道德缺陷。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “Your father has committed grave and terrible crimes, my lady,” Grand Maester Pycelle intoned.
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle庄重说Eddard犯grave crimes。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa克服恐惧公开求Eddard mercy，在不否认treason前提下提供被欺骗/药物解释，最终得到以confession为条件的承诺。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “Ah, poor sad thing,” sighed Varys. “She is only a babe, my lords, she does not know what she asks.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys装作怜惜，称她只是baby不懂请求。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys的baby语言表面保护，实则削弱她作为有判断力petitioner的资格。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: Sansa had eyes only for Joffrey. He must listen to me, he must, she thought. The king shifted on his seat, “Let her speak,” he commanded. “I want to hear what she says.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa只看Joffrey；他移坐后命众人让她说。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa克服恐惧公开求Eddard mercy，在不否认treason前提下提供被欺骗/药物解释，最终得到以confession为条件的承诺。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “Thank you, Your Grace.” Sansa smiled, a shy secret smile, just for him. He was listening. She knew he would.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她用只给Joffrey的secret smile道谢，确信他会听。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa克服恐惧公开求Eddard mercy，在不否认treason前提下提供被欺骗/药物解释，最终得到以confession为条件的承诺。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “Treason is a noxious weed,” Pycelle declared solemnly. “It must be torn up, root and stem and seed, lest new traitors sprout from every roadside.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle把treason比作必须连root、stem、seed拔除的毒草。
blocks.literary_note_zh: weed metaphor将treason生物化、遗传化，为punish root/seed即family提供语言。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “Do you deny your father’s crime?” Lord Baelish asked.
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger问她是否否认Eddard罪行。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa克服恐惧公开求Eddard mercy，在不否认treason前提下提供被欺骗/药物解释，最终得到以confession为条件的承诺。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “No, my lords.” Sansa knew better than that. “I know he must be punished. All I ask is mercy. I know my lord father must regret what he did. He was King Robert’s friend and he loved him, you all know he loved him. He never wanted to be Hand until the king asked him. They must have lied to him. Lord Renly or Lord Stannis or . . . or somebody, they must have lied, otherwise . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa明白不能否认，只求mercy；她称Eddard爱Robert，推测Renly、Stannis或别人欺骗了他。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa不否认是现实判断：她若挑战官方事实，petition会被直接归入treason。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: King Joffrey leaned forward, hands grasping the arms of the throne. Broken sword points fanned out between his fingers. “He said I wasn’t the king. Why did he say that?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey抓throne arms追问Eddard为何说自己不是king。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa克服恐惧公开求Eddard mercy，在不否认treason前提下提供被欺骗/药物解释，最终得到以confession为条件的承诺。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “His leg was broken,” Sansa replied eagerly. “It hurt ever so much, Maester Pycelle was giving him milk of the poppy, and they say that milk of the poppy fills your head with clouds. Otherwise he would never have said it.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa急切以broken leg和milk of poppy使头脑clouded解释。
blocks.literary_note_zh: milk of poppy解释是她为父亲保留善意与king legitimacy而创造的medical excuse，没有direct evidence。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: Varys said, “A child’s faith . . . such sweet innocence . . . and yet, they say wisdom oft comes from the mouths of babes.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys赞child faith与innocence，又暗示babes口中也可能有wisdom。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys语句双向：可称她innocent，也可暗示她无意说出真实疑点。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “Treason is treason,” Pycelle replied at once.
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle立即重申treason不因解释改变。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa克服恐惧公开求Eddard mercy，在不否认treason前提下提供被欺骗/药物解释，最终得到以confession为条件的承诺。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: Joffrey rocked restlessly on the throne. “Mother?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey不安摇动并向Cersei求判断。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa克服恐惧公开求Eddard mercy，在不否认treason前提下提供被欺骗/药物解释，最终得到以confession为条件的承诺。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: Cersei Lannister considered Sansa thoughtfully. “If Lord Eddard were to confess his crime,” she said at last, “we would know he had repented his folly.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei说若Eddard confess便证明repent。
blocks.literary_note_zh: confession使mercy取决于Eddard公开验证Joffrey legitimacy，而非仅悔过一般crime。
blocks.background_zh: **confession value：** Eddard若当众承认treason与Joffrey kingship，可为new regime提供比处刑更强的legitimacy statement。

blocks.original_text: Joffrey pushed himself to his feet. Please, Sansa thought, please, please, be the king I know you are, good and kind and noble, please. “Do you have any more to say?” he asked her.
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey起身，Sansa祈求他成为自己想象的good、kind、noble king；他问还有什么。
blocks.literary_note_zh: be the king I know you are显示Sansa仍用ideal prince template覆盖眼前dismissal、mockery与arrest orders。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “Only . . . that as you love me, you do me this kindness, my prince,” Sansa said.
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa以Joffrey love请求这份kindness。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa克服恐惧公开求Eddard mercy，在不否认treason前提下提供被欺骗/药物解释，最终得到以confession为条件的承诺。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: King Joffrey looked her up and down. “Your sweet words have moved me,” he said gallantly, nodding, as if to say all would be well. “I shall do as you ask . . . but first your father has to confess. He has to confess and say that I’m the king, or there will be no mercy for him.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey审视她后称sweet words感动自己，承诺照办但以Eddard confess并承认他为king作mercy条件。
blocks.literary_note_zh: conditional mercy是political conversion：Eddard必须改写public truth，Joffrey才考虑保命。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。

blocks.original_text: “He will,” Sansa said, heart soaring. “Oh, I know he will.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa心情飞扬，确信父亲会confess。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa只听到mercy可能性，未面对Eddard honor与false confession冲突。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在new regime的court spectacle、office重分配与Sansa petition的受限策略。
